complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down into: 1) GitHub repo creation and licensing, 2) Node.js/TypeScript project initialization with config files, 3) Folder structure and code quality tools setup (ESLint/Prettier), 4) GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline configuration.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Standard boilerplate setup using established tools and patterns. Low technical risk, mostly configuration and following best practices. Multiple components but each is straightforward.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Database Schema Design and Migration System
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide into: 1) Core tables design (institutions, users, etc.), 2) Row-level security implementation, 3) Migration system setup with node-pg-migrate, 4) Performance indexes, 5) Encrypted credential storage, 6) Testing and validation scripts.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Involves complex PostgreSQL RLS for multi-tenancy, encryption implementation, performance optimization, and migration tooling. High risk of data integrity issues and security vulnerabilities.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Fastify Server Foundation with Health Check
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Split into: 1) Fastify server initialization with TypeScript, 2) Environment configuration and validation, 3) Health check endpoint and structured logging setup.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Standard web server setup with common middleware patterns. Moderate complexity from environment validation and logging configuration.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down: 1) OIDC client setup with openid-client, 2) Login/callback/logout endpoint implementation, 3) Single vs multi-tenant mode handling, 4) Secure session management, 5) Azure AD group claims extraction.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Complex OAuth flows with multiple configuration modes, security-critical session handling, and external identity provider integration. High security risk.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Microsoft Graph API Integration for Group Sync
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide into: 1) MSAL authentication setup, 2) Graph API client for group membership, 3) Group-to-department mapping logic, 4) Auto-department creation and error handling.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: External API integration with rate limiting, complex mapping logic, database writes, and dependency on prior auth system. Moderate-to-high coupling complexity.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Split into: 1) OAuth metadata endpoint, 2) Dynamic client registration, 3) Authorize endpoint with PKCE, 4) Token endpoint with refresh rotation, 5) Revoke endpoint, 6) JWT signing and database storage, 7) Compliance testing.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Full OAuth 2.1 authorization server implementation with PKCE, multiple endpoints, security standards compliance (RFCs), and state management. Very high security and complexity.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break into: 1) RBAC middleware development, 2) Role hierarchy definition, 3) Permission checking logic, 4) Role assignment from Azure groups, 5) Session and token authorization.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Complex permission model with hierarchy, scoping, inheritance, and integration across auth/session layers. High risk of access control bugs.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide: 1) Proxy endpoint routing, 2) Token/permission validation, 3) MCP server forwarding, 4) Tool allowlist enforcement, 5) Caching implementation, 6) Error handling and logging.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Proxy architecture with auth, permissions, caching, allowlisting, and error resilience. Multiple cross-cutting concerns increase implementation complexity.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Split by feature: 1) Container/Dockerfile setup, 2) MS Graph OAuth flow, 3-7) Individual MCP tools (Mail, Calendar, Files, Teams, Directory), 8) Credential encryption and token refresh.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Multiple complex API integrations (5+ Graph endpoints), containerization, encryption, and OAuth. Very high integration and testing complexity.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down: 1) Audit middleware implementation, 2) Database storage and indexing, 3) Log viewer UI with filtering/export, 4) Retention policies and immutability.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Cross-cutting middleware with UI component, performance considerations for high-volume logging, and compliance requirements.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide into: 1) Template engine setup, 2) Dashboard page implementation, 3) Navigation and auth integration.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Server-side rendering with basic UI. Moderate complexity from auth integration and responsive design.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Split by sections: 1) Overview/metrics, 2) Departments management, 3) Members management, 4) Servers control, 5) Tool access config, 6) Audit viewer/export.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Comprehensive CRUD admin interface with multiple complex features and RBAC integration.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Department Management and Tool Access Control
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break into: 1) Department admin UI, 2) Tool allowlist API/UI, 3) Member management, 4) Scoped audit viewing.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Scoped admin functionality building on prior admin panel. Moderate complexity with inheritance/override logic.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide: 1) docker-compose.yml services definition, 2) Lantern Dockerfile, 3) .env and networking/volume config.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Standard DevOps configuration following established Docker patterns. Low implementation risk.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Split: 1) Multi-tenant mode flag handling, 2) Institution registration API, 3) RLS updates across all queries, 4) Isolation middleware, 5) Institution management, 6) Tenant-aware OAuth.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Architecturally complex multi-tenancy retrofit requiring RLS updates everywhere, isolation guarantees, and registration flows. Highest risk for data leakage.
